name: Card Hover Effect
summary: An interactive card component that responds to hover with sophisticated visual transformations including lifts, shadows, borders, and content reveals for engaging content presentation.
detailedDescription: The Card Hover Effect component transforms static cards into interactive elements that respond elegantly to user hover interactions. This component excels at creating rewarding micro-interactions that make interfaces feel responsive and polished. When users hover over a card, multiple visual changes occur in harmony - the card may lift slightly with translateY transforms, shadows deepen and expand to simulate elevation, borders or glows appear to highlight the active state, and content elements may shift or reveal additional information. These transitions are carefully choreographed with appropriate timing and easing to feel natural rather than mechanical. The component supports various hover styles from subtle professional effects suitable for enterprise contexts to bold, dramatic transformations for creative portfolios. Performance is optimized through CSS transforms and will-change properties, ensuring smooth 60fps animations even with multiple cards on screen. Perfect for product cards, feature grids, testimonial displays, portfolio items, or any card-based layout where adding interactive polish enhances user engagement and perceived quality.
purpose: Transform static cards into interactive elements that reward user exploration
Create polished micro-interactions that enhance perceived interface quality
Provide visual feedback that clearly indicates interactive card elements
Support various hover styles from subtle professional to bold dramatic effects
Enhance user engagement through responsive, satisfying hover interactions
behavior: Detects hover state and triggers coordinated visual transformations
Applies translateY lift effect simulating physical elevation
Deepens and expands shadows to reinforce depth perception
Reveals borders, glows, or highlights on hover activation
Optionally reveals additional content or shifts existing elements
Uses CSS transforms for smooth 60fps hover transitions
Returns smoothly to rest state when hover ends
visualCharacteristics: Dynamic visual transformation on hover creating interactive feedback
Lifted appearance with enhanced shadows suggesting physical elevation
Smooth, choreographed transitions feeling natural and responsive
Configurable from subtle professional to bold dramatic effects
Clear interactive affordance indicating clickable card elements
Polished, premium appearance enhancing overall interface quality
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
